violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Multiple food items found uncovered in the walk-in cooler. Food items should be covered to protect them from contamination.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Multiple pans of unidentifiable food items were found moldy in the walk-in cooler. Food items should be discarded if not consumed with-in 10 days of preparation. Food items were also not marked with the preparation date.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Several piles of dirty dishes were found through out the kitchen and in the 3 compartment sink. These should be cleaned more frequently so there is not such an accumulation. Ice machine deflector was also found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units throughout the kitchen and in the walk-in cooler were found dirty. Shelving units should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system filters were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Rubber spatula storage pan in the kitchen was found dirty. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring throughout the kitchen and in the walk-in cooler was found very dirty during inspection. These areas should be cleaned thoroughly and maintained clean. Kitchen flooring may need to be replaced if it does not come clean. Wall behind the grill was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
